data.title: dso:red-test-writer generates existence-only and body-text grep assertions violating behavioral standard Rule 5
data.description: Both RED test files created by dso:red-test-writer in sprint batch for epic 4ba1-759f violated behavioral testing standard Rule 5: (1) test_scale_inference_file_exists used existence-only check (test -f) without structural assertion; (2) test_scale_inference_required_sections used grep -qi for body-text phrases instead of section-heading checks. Same pattern repeated in test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh. Required autonomous resolution in both review passes to fix. The agent should be producing section-heading assertions (grep -q '^## ') not body-text phrase checks when writing tests for instruction files. Fix: update dso:red-test-writer agent guidance to explicitly describe Rule 5 requirements for .md instruction files.
